title: 開発者がエラーやトラブルシュートで検索している最新・トレンドの開発ツールとして、以下の21のツールが挙げられます。 の 504 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: The article contains outdated information regarding the default timeout for Apache HTTP Server.
The article provides outdated information on the maximum integration timeout for AWS API Gateway REST APIs, not reflecting recent increases in configurable limits for specific API types.
The article excerpt lacks in-line citations for its factual claims, making verification difficult without external search.
citation coverage is below the threshold
freshness score is below the threshold
required_actions: Update the default value for Apache HTTP Server's `Timeout` directive to 60 seconds (for Apache 2.4+).

Revise the AWS API Gateway integration timeout section to include information about the June 2024 update, specifying that Regional and Private REST APIs can now have their timeouts extended beyond 29 seconds (up to 300 seconds) via a Service Quota request, while HTTP APIs remain capped at 30 seconds.
Add in-line citations with URLs to official documentation or primary sources for all factual claims made in the article.
Specify the exact Nginx `proxy_*_timeout` directives (e.g., `proxy_read_timeout`, `proxy_send_timeout`, `proxy_connect_timeout`) that default to 60 seconds for enhanced clarity.
Add links to official documentation or primary sources for key claims.
Review current official docs and update changed API/spec/pricing details.

sources.title: 504 Gateway Timeout: What It Means & How to Fix - DNS Robot
sources.claim: 504 Gateway Timeout is an HTTP status code indicating that a gateway or proxy server did not receive a timely response from an upstream server.

sources.title: What is a 504 Gateway Timeout Error? - support.cpanel.net.
sources.claim: The 504 (Gateway Timeout) status code indicates that the server, while acting as a gateway or proxy, did not receive a timely response from an upstream server it needed to access in order to complete the request (RFC-7231).

sources.title: Tune NGINX Timeouts: Eliminate Upstream Errors - Netdata
sources.claim: Nginx's `proxy_connect_timeout`, `proxy_send_timeout`, and `proxy_read_timeout` all default to 60 seconds.

sources.title: Module ngx_http_proxy_module - nginx
sources.claim: The Nginx `proxy_send_timeout` and `proxy_read_timeout` directives have a default of 60 seconds.

sources.title: NGINX Timeouts and How to Disable Them | Baeldung on Linux
sources.claim: Nginx `proxy_connect_timeout`, `proxy_read_timeout`, and `proxy_send_timeout` all default to 60 seconds.

sources.title: NGINX Timeout Directives: Complete Configuration Guide - GetPageSpeed
sources.claim: Nginx `proxy_read_timeout`, `proxy_connect_timeout`, and `proxy_send_timeout` directives default to 60 seconds.

sources.title: 【Apache入門】Timeoutディレクティブの使い方：応答がない場合の待ち時間を設定
sources.claim: The default value for Apache's `Timeout` directive is 60 seconds (for Apache 2.4 and later).

sources.title: Apacheのタイムアウト(Timeout)を設定・確認する方法【2.4対応版】
sources.claim: In modern Apache 2.4 series and later, the default value for the `Timeout` directive is 60 seconds.

sources.title: ApacheのTimeoutを設定する方法、デフォルト値、ProxyTimeoutやKeepAliveTimeoutとの違い
sources.claim: The default value for the `Timeout` directive, if not specified, is 60 seconds.

sources.title: Amazon API Gateway 統合のタイムアウト制限が 29 秒から引き上げ - AWS
sources.claim: As of June 2024, Amazon API Gateway integration timeout limits for Regional and Private REST APIs can be increased beyond the previous 29-second limit via a Service Quota request.

sources.title: [アップデート] Amazon API Gateway の統合タイムアウトを 29 秒より長く設定出来るようになったので、申請から設定までやってみた | DevelopersIO
sources.claim: For REST APIs, the default integration timeout is 29 seconds, but for Regional and Private REST APIs, it can now be extended via a Service Quota request. HTTP APIs remain at a maximum of 30 seconds.

sources.title: What the maximum default timeout for API Gateway can be increased to after applying for a Service Quotas limit increase. | AWS re:Post
sources.claim: API Gateway integration timeout can be extended from the default of 29 seconds up to a maximum of 300 seconds (5 minutes) for Regional REST APIs and Private REST APIs via Service Quotas.

sources.title: GitHub API の 504 エラー：原因と解決策 - Zenn
sources.claim: GitHub API's 504 Gateway Timeout errors can be caused by reaching rate limits, excessive API calls to large repositories, or complex queries.

sources.title: How to Get the Most out of GitHub API Rate Limits | Blog - Endor Labs
sources.claim: Unauthenticated GitHub API requests are limited to 60 requests per hour, while authenticated user requests have a limit of 5,000 requests per hour.

sources.title: GraphQL API のレート制限とクエリ制限 - GitHubドキュメント
sources.claim: GitHub API requests taking over 10 seconds to process may result in 502 or 504 status codes indicating a timeout. Secondary rate limits can also occur from too many concurrent requests or requests to a single endpoint per minute.

sources.title: Rate limits for the REST API - GitHub Docs
sources.claim: Unauthenticated GitHub API requests have a primary rate limit of 60 requests per hour. Authenticated user requests (with a personal access token) have a primary rate limit of 5,000 requests per hour.

sources.title: REST API のトラブルシューティング - GitHubドキュメント
sources.claim: GitHub API rate limit errors can occur if requests continue during rate limits, potentially leading to integration bans.

sources.title: GitHub APIでrate limitでリクエストが失敗した時の対処法 - Qiita
sources.claim: Unauthenticated GitHub API requests are limited to 60 requests per hour, which can cause CI failures if not authenticated.

sources.title: What could cause 504 gateway errors during API consumption? : r/github - Reddit
sources.claim: Repeated requests to the GitHub API, even within quota, can lead to 504 errors.

sources.title: GitHub での大きいファイルについて
sources.claim: GitHub repositories are recommended to be kept under 1GB (ideally) and 5GB (strong recommendation) for optimal performance and manageability. Fetching content from large repositories can lead to 504 errors.

citation_mismatches.claimed: Apache HTTPサーバーの`Timeout`ディレクティブのデフォルト値は300秒
citation_mismatches.actual: Apache HTTP Server 2.4以降の`Timeout`ディレクティブのデフォルト値は60秒

citation_mismatches.claimed: Apache HTTPサーバーでも同様に、`Timeout`ディレクティブのデフォルト値（300秒）が不適切な場合、504エラーが発生します。
citation_mismatches.actual: Apache 2.4以降のTimeoutディレクティブのデフォルト値は60秒です。古いバージョン（2.2以前）では300秒でした。

citation_mismatches.claimed: AWS API Gatewayのデフォルト最大統合タイムアウトは30秒であり、これ以上の延長はできません。
citation_mismatches.actual: Amazon API Gatewayでは、統合タイムアウトを以前の上限の29秒から引き上げられるようになりました。リージョンREST APIとプライベートREST APIでは、サービス割り当ての増加を申請することで、29秒より長く設定できます。

tags: 開発者がエラーやトラブルシュートで検索している最新・トレンドの開発ツールとして、以下の21のツールが挙げられます。
